description_for_human: Access comprehensive financial data, market analytics, and company fundamentals from FactSet.
description_for_model: Use this plugin to retrieve financial statements, market data, consensus estimates, company profiles, peer comparisons, price history, fundamentals, and financial ratios from FactSet. Call this when the user needs detailed financial analysis data for public companies.

functions.name: get_financials
functions.description: Retrieve financial statements (income statement, balance sheet, cash flow) for a company.

statement_type.description: Type of financial statement: income_statement, balance_sheet, or cash_flow

functions.name: get_market_data
functions.description: Retrieve current and historical market data including price, volume, and market cap.

date_range.description: Date range for historical data (e.g., 1Y, 6M, YTD, 2023-01-01:2024-01-01)

metrics.description: Specific metrics to retrieve (e.g., price, volume, market_cap, enterprise_value)

functions.name: get_consensus_estimates
functions.description: Retrieve analyst consensus estimates for revenue, EPS, and other financial metrics.

metrics.description: Metrics to retrieve (e.g., revenue, eps, ebitda)

functions.name: get_company_profile
functions.description: Retrieve company overview including sector, industry, description, executives, and key details.

functions.name: get_peers
functions.description: Retrieve a list of peer companies for comparison analysis based on sector, size, and business model.

criteria.description: Peer selection criteria: sector, industry, market_cap, or custom

functions.name: get_price_history
functions.description: Retrieve historical price data including OHLCV and adjusted prices.

frequency.description: Data frequency: daily, weekly, or monthly

functions.name: get_fundamentals
functions.description: Retrieve fundamental data including growth rates, margins, returns, and efficiency metrics.

metrics.description: Specific fundamental metrics (e.g., revenue_growth, gross_margin, roe, roic)

functions.name: get_ratios
functions.description: Retrieve financial ratios including valuation, profitability, leverage, and liquidity ratios.

ratio_type.description: Category of ratios: valuation, profitability, leverage, liquidity, or all

functions.name: get_ma_deals
functions.description: Retrieve M&A deal data including transaction details, multiples, premiums, and deal terms.

ticker.description: Target company ticker symbol (e.g., AAPL, MSFT)

deal_type.description: Type of deal: merger, acquisition, divestiture, or all

sector.description: Filter by target sector (e.g., Technology, Healthcare)

min_deal_value.description: Minimum deal value in millions USD
